race.comment: ROCKBARTON MARSHAL (5) was a determined maiden winner last time out, scoring by a neck after leading them up at Port Macquarie. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Bullock taking over from a low draw is another big plus. MEDDLESOME (11) finds it tough to land her second winning blow but is clearly going well enough. Kept on the fresh side for this and doesn't need to improve much to break a long run of outs. THE MANAGER (3) raced just off the pace before letting down nicely and scoring a neck win over this journey at Dubbo last time in what has already proven a hot form race. Can keep the ball rolling. EN PRIMEUR (14) gave away a considerable start over the mile at Quirindi last time before closing strongly into fourth. Drawn to settle closer this time on the drop back to 1400m. Watch for her bursting through. SMART SCUD (6) also got home strongly last start when shedding his maiden tag and is another worth keeping an eye on.
